item.title: We're the Millers - billionaires' taxes
item.description: #billionaire #taxes #tax #billionaires #sweden #netherlands #germany #UnitedStates #taxation #memes #meme #FunnyMemes #funny #WereTheMillers #JasonSudeikis #JenniferAniston #EmmaRoberts #WillPoulter alt text: 4 frame We're the Millers style meme 1) [Jason Sudeikis as David Clark from We're the Millers - movie still] Sweden - We tax our billionaires 55.5% 2) [Jennifer Aniston as Rose O'Reilly from We're the Millers - movie still] Netherlands - We tax ours 49/5% 3) [Emma Roberts as Casey Mathis from We're the Millers - movie still] Germany - We tax ours 47.4675% 4) [Will Poulter as Kenny Rossmore from We're the Millers - movie still] United States - You tax your billionaires?
item.dc:creator: davidaugust

item.title: You don’t have to justify yourself to randos, or debate them

item.dc:creator: ttimbric

item.title: My Eighthttthhth Dump
item.description:
Greetings fellow travelers! The countdown continues. 1480 images left to release!
Oh! I got like an accolade thingy the other day! Very exciting. I do NOT know what that means.
Also, I still read all of your comments as they come in. You guys are awesome.
Let's see what mysteries this weird time capsule has for us today...
... huh, two cilantro memes in one dump. You don't see that very often.
Hideous.
GOTTEEEEEEEM!! Woo, we're back baybeeee!!
Another route marker in the timeline. I guess we've reached the US withdrawal from Afghanistan. Tumultuous. Chaotic. Tragic. And of course immediately turned into memes.
I cannot tell you how much I laughed the first time I encountered beesechurger. There might be something wrong with me. To this day, whispering "beesechurger" to myself still never fails to make me giggle.
Ducking garlic cowards can GET OUT!
(These lunatics flooded part of their hull to tilt the ship, allowing their guns to fire further inland in support of allied troops)
This is really, really funny, and so few of you will get it.
Hey, remember when ducking OnlyFans thought it would be a good idea to ban mature content? Yeah, way to go, tumblr.
... this one might be another repeat from an earlier dump. I hope history will forgive me.
This from that time the President of the United States told people to eat horse de-wormer to cure a respiratory virus. As a lib, I felt very owned.
I ducking love Letterkenny.
Amen.
Uwu et cetera.
Honestly you guys, Oddish was, and remains, one of my all-time favourite pokemans. Oddish and Scyther. I would trade so many much better cards just to get more Oddish and Scyther.
Plant meme! It's a plant meme!
Good for her!
Today's end of dump image is not a pretty lady, but instead a pretty car. Sorry!
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

Also my store's currently on sale! Get 15% off everything (at checkout). Ends this weekend https://shop.loadingartist.com

item.title: Maybe, I'll wake up as a butterfly.
item.description: Since it pumps in air, I can fully cocoon myself in my blanket without needing to stick my face out for fresh air. Success Kid because I've wished I could do this since I was a child.

.

.

.

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Mêmę Dümp
item.description:
Happy pi day, nerds.
That sassy look in the last picture is perfect.
Do it, cowards.
Yeah, I'm not sure what I am... I'm confident I am demisexual, but these people are so pretty.
No one else does.
That's an A+ witty comeback.
Lol.
Noice.
This is indeed very surreal. I still love the trivia that the original painting was painted on Goya's dining room wall.
Seven slugs of bourbon seems like a lot for a preteen.
I'm afraid to go to this website and see what it's about.
Mmm, squish the beans between your toes.
Yes Daphne, you are going to hell.
Yeah...
Teehee.
Only if you promise to take me with you.
Oh noes!
You all are my homies. Haha, gotcha bitch.
I don't know the significance of the lemons, but this snippet of comic made me laugh.
Yeah, at least the guys on the sub went fast.
That comparison makes both dragons and horses more terrifying.
Surprise positivity, bam!
If it's fantasy, it's a shit fantasy and I want my money back.
If you haven't watched Delicious in Dungeon, you really should.
I sing this daily.
Be the Molotov cocktail you'd like to see in the world.
Hur Hur, Mastervader.
ACAB.
Whoever is drinking straight vanilla extract is an as-of-yet undiscovered cryptid.
I had never made that connection. Thanks, I hate it.
HAAAHAHAHAH... yeah, no.
Po-tay-toes.
It's crushing.
So I post memes online, you're welcome!
Yeah, I'm old, can I please stop having acne.
Thicc.
Oh, if only I could sleep full time.
I would have thought it would be the hatman dragging you, but this works too.
I'LL BE COZY IF I WANNA.
I honestly like Anakin's redemption arc, but it makes everything else so much funnier. In the original trilogy he's badass and dark and menacing, but really he's the most dramatic drama queen in the galaxy and would have benefited from therapy to deal with big feelings in a healthier way.
Everyone with money knows each other.
Yeah, goddammit Kelly.
Fucked.
It's a valuable lesson.
I love my stuffed animals.
I would pay money to see JV do a Batman comic.
I would love to see Bob Ross's postmodern art.
These are hilarious, and I want them to make carousel horse versions.
Googly eyes make everything better.
I heart carbs. I spent three hours fighting with my tablet and my drawing program because they weren't working together, and when I finally fixed it I had no motivation to draw. So you get this instead of my Daily Sketch For Mental Health.
item.dc:creator: DeVleermuis

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
good thing none of this was discussed beforehand apparently
i feel like i knew this as a kid but totally forgot about it
ah, young love
nothing sexual going on there
this looks like something i must've stolen from abbii
i was a fan as a kid. big league chew was my favorite
i truly cannot imagine inventing glove of bones
this is where i post from
mmm hmm
this might be the most unhinged room i've ever seen
all of the above
garlic is good
yes
i try to do as little as possible on my weekends
i'm sorry what?
that's really not that much for that time frame
that's all for me.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: NonFungibleUsername

item.title: It's been 15 years since your ascent to the heavens
item.description: 3/15/2009: On March 15, 2009, during launch preparations for STS-119, a free-tailed bat, injured and frightened, latched on to the foam insulation of Space Shuttle Discovery's external propellant tank. His wing was broken and thus his life would soon end. But in a moment of bravery and ambition, his little claws buried deep into his foamy vessel, he became master of his own fate. He would not succumb to starvation or predation. No, he would soar into bat legend. He would touch the stars. As Discovery's rockets roared to life, he held his ground, although he was certainly afraid. In his adrenaline-soaked brain he may have thought, "Can a bat still be brave if he's afraid?" I imagine he heard the answer echo, as though off the walls of his dark, cavernous home: "That is the only time a bat can be brave." Once the shuttle's rockets began pushing its massive frame toward the heavens, he turned his little eyes skyward. The shuttle gained speed, terrifying speed, and he knew he would soon slip the surly bonds of the Earth. His grip would eventually fail as Discovery sped faster than a bullet toward the inky, Stygian blackness of space. Although his small body was incinerated by the bright hellfire of the shuttle's exhaust, his legend will burn brighter. We must never forget his shining example. We must never forget to be brave in the face of overwhelming adversity. We must never forget to strive every day to be more than we are. We must never forget the final, heroic flight of Space Bat. **Text copied from Reddit user Skycake.** Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/space/s/iOK7hW5xDX My own personal note: What a legend, and what a story that has followed as the community comes together to recognize Space Bat. May you shine forever in the cosmos.
item.dc:creator: Sallysalvo

item.title: Progess
item.description: Sorry about the selfie, but I just wanted to share my progress with my fellow Imgurians. Left shot is me 3 months ago, right is me now. Additional: I'll share another pic three months from now, also I'll do my best to get Winds of Winter finished off. (originally posted by @HairyParasite on 2023-03-16 09:26:38)
